description: Stabilize, modernize, and optimize the Foundry VTT v13 isometric module with phased hotfix, refactor, and performance improvements.

userStories.title: Fix runtime version/config mismatch
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want version/config constants to be internally consistent so compatibility checks execute as intended.
acceptanceCriteria: All code paths read and write the same version field name (single source of truth).
v13 execution path is validated via smoke scenario startup.
No dead compatibility logic remains due to wrong config key names.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Fixed isometricModuleConfig.CONST -> .FOUNDRY_VERSION. Moved config init before register calls. Consolidated game.version parsing to single source of truth.

userStories.title: Implement fully reversible scene/background transforms
userStories.description: As a GM, I want toggling isometric mode on/off to always restore scene visuals correctly so I don't get lingering distortions.
acceptanceCriteria: Enabling/disabling isometric resets/sets all required transform properties (rotation, skew, scale, anchor, position) deterministically.
Switching scenes does not leave stale transform state.
Background transform behavior is consistent with isometricBackground flag.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added save/restore pattern for background transform state. captureBackgroundDefaults() saves Foundry defaults before first isometric transform; restoreBackgroundDefaults() fully restores rotation, skew, anchor, scale, position on disable. resetBackgroundTracking() called on canvasReady for clean scene switches.

userStories.title: Implement full token/tile transform reset path
userStories.description: As a user, I want token and tile meshes to return to correct non-isometric state when isometric is disabled.
acceptanceCriteria: Token and tile non-isometric branch applies explicit reset, not partial early return.
Repeated toggling does not accumulate visual drift.
Token flags (isoScaleDisabled, offsets, anchors) do not corrupt non-isometric rendering.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: applyIsometricPerspective now reprocesses all tokens/tiles on both enable and disable, routing non-isometric branches through explicit reset logic to clear skew/rotation/scale drift.

userStories.title: Add structured debug logging and remove production noise
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want debug output to be consistently gated so normal users do not get console spam.
acceptanceCriteria: Unconditional console.log in runtime rendering/config pathways removed or gated behind debug setting.
Debug logs use a common helper/prefix for easier filtering.
Default module startup in non-debug mode emits no noisy logs.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Introduced shared logger helper with `[Isometric Perspective]` prefix, gated all runtime logging behind debug flag, and removed remaining unconditional console output.

userStories.title: Consolidate and throttle expensive hook-driven updates
userStories.description: As a player, I want smooth movement and interaction so occlusion and dynamic tile features do not degrade FPS significantly.
acceptanceCriteria: Occlusion and dynamic tile update triggers are consolidated with throttling/debouncing.
Redundant multi-hook refresh storms are reduced.
Behavior remains functionally equivalent in standard scenarios.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Throttled occlusion/dynamic tile updates through consolidated hook scheduler to prevent refresh storms while maintaining behavior.

userStories.title: Harden dynamic tile linked-wall lifecycle
userStories.description: As a GM, I want linked wall behavior to be stable so tile visibility logic remains correct across updates and scene changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Linked wall flag normalization is centralized and avoids unnecessary writes.
Tile-wall selection and clear actions remain reliable after repeated edits.
Scene changes cleanly reinitialize dynamic containers without leaks/stale references.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added centralized linkedWallIds normalization + dedupe, guarded setFlag writes to avoid redundant update loops, normalized scene tiles on canvasReady, and hardened dynamic container teardown/rebuild on scene transitions.

userStories.title: Refactor sorting/patch strategy for safer interop
userStories.description: As a module maintainer, I want safer extension points for token sorting so other modules are less likely to conflict.
acceptanceCriteria: Current token sorting override approach is refactored to safer extension/patch pattern for v13.
Sorting still respects isometric depth and selection visibility.
No regressions in auto-sorting when enabled.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Replaced eager Token.prototype monkey-patch with init-time wrapper registration (libWrapper WRAPPER when available, guarded direct fallback otherwise) to preserve interop while keeping isometric depth + controlled-token visibility behavior.

userStories.title: Define v13 smoke test suite and release gate checklist
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want repeatable smoke tests so each release has minimum validation coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke checklist covers scene toggle, projection change, token/tile offsets, HUD/ruler alignment, auto-sort, dynamic tile, and occlusion modes.
Checklist includes expected/actual outcomes and pass/fail markers.
Checklist is referenced in release process docs.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added dedicated v13 Release Smoke Suite section with Expected/Actual/PASS-FAIL tracking in SMOKE-TEST.md and created RELEASE-PROCESS.md that requires this checklist as a pre-release gate.

userStories.title: Align docs/manifest/release process with actual v13 support
userStories.description: As an installer or user, I want metadata and docs to match reality so setup and expectations are clear.
acceptanceCriteria: README compatibility statements are updated to v13 reality.
Manifest fields and badges align with supported versions.
Release script/docs remove stale repository/action references.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated README compatibility messaging and Foundry badge to v13, and removed stale repository/action reference in release.js so release guidance matches the current repo.

userStories.title: Performance profiling baseline for occlusion modes
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want measurable occlusion performance baselines so optimization decisions are evidence-based.
acceptanceCriteria: Baseline scenarios are defined for token counts, tile counts, and zoom ranges.
CPU-mode chunk configurations are compared and documented.
Recommended defaults are selected based on measured tradeoffs.
Smoke test script/checklist updated and executed.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Defined baseline scenario matrix (token/tile density + zoom ranges), documented CPU chunk-mode tradeoffs and selected default policy in PERFORMANCE-BASELINE.md, and added US-010 smoke checklist plus release-gate reference.
